title: Inventory emergency transport and maternal health data
outcome: A dated source inventory separating travel-time data, facility data, ambulance data, and mortality data.
validation_method: Reviewer checks each source for URL, methodology, grain, and limitations.
done_condition: Five sources classified as usable, limited, or rejected with explicit reasons.

title: Map emergency obstetric travel-time access at sub-national scale
outcome: A sub-national map of population within 30-minute and 60-minute travel time of EmOC facilities.
validation_method: Replicator reruns travel-time analysis with alternative routing algorithms and confirms access estimates within reported tolerance.
done_condition: Travel-time map with population-access statistics and replication.

title: Map ambulance-coverage gaps relative to maternal mortality risk
outcome: An ambulance-coverage gap map combining travel-time access, ambulance-depot locations, and maternal mortality data.
validation_method: Replicator confirms gap methodology and validates ambulance data against independent sources.
done_condition: Gap map includes ambulance-data caveats, mortality-risk weighting, and replication.

title: Red-team misuse of emergency transport data
outcome: A failure-mode review identifying facility-closure, false-precision, and misallocation risks.
validation_method: Mitigations confirmed or publication blocked, then replicated.
done_condition: Every operational claim is either qualified, softened to analytic language, or gated behind replication.

title: Check whether outputs match EMS and maternal health planning needs
outcome: A field-facing review of whether transport-gap maps change ambulance deployment or community transport schemes responsibly.
expected_artifact: playbooks.md update with use and non-use guidance.
validation_method: Field reviewer identifies the actual decision, user, timing, and misuse risk, then replicated.
done_condition: Named user, named decision, explicit non-use cases, and replicated field-reality review.
